prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 13458→22060→17334→29206→27965，整体呈大幅波动后移趋势。2021–2022 年从约 13458 名后移至 22060 名（后移约 8600 名），2023 年短暂回升至 17334 名，2024 年骤降至 29206 名（较 2023 年后移约 11872 名），2025 年小幅回升至 27965 名（较 2024 年前移约 1241 名）。近 3 年累计后移约 10631 名，波动剧烈，2025 年基准约 27965 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2022 年均为 85 人，2023–2024 年 84 人，2025 年增至 87 人；2026 年计划 95 人，较 2025 年扩招 8 人（增幅约 9.2%），扩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争略有缓解，但需结合考生规模综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 84 名（2026 年），近年排名从 75 名小幅下滑至 84 名，整体稳定在 75–84 名区间，属中上水平理工类高校；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度未进入全国前 100 名，短视频曝光度一般，报考关注度处于中等水平；电气工程 A（全国顶尖水平）、动力工程及工程热物理 A-，两大王牌学科与电力行业高度契合，对高分考生吸引力强；电气类专业社会热度持续高热（2024 年专业热度指数 74.28，属高热推荐），是该校核心竞争力和报考热点。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业社会热度高热推荐，能源动力类专业推荐，计算机类、电子信息类等也属偏热专业；本省物理类考生数持续增长：2021 年 16.6 万→2022 年 19.5 万→2023 年 22.0 万→2024 年 24.6 万→2025 年 26.1 万，2026 年全省总考生约 52.1 万，按近年物理类占比约 73% 估算约 38 万人，较 2025 年大幅增加约 12 万人，竞争显著加剧；华北电力大学（北京）位于北京，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；该校在全国招生总量中江苏省占比约 3–4%，属正常外省招生比例，无明显地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次大幅波动后移趋势、2026 年扩招约 9.2%（缓解竞争）、本省物理类考生大幅增加约 12 万人（加剧竞争）、电气王牌专业高热推荐（吸引高分考生）以及声誉平稳等因素，扩招与考生增加相互对冲，但考生增量远超扩招幅度，预计竞争总体加剧。在 2025 年基准 27965 名基础上，预测最低位次约 29808 名，区间 29308–30308 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13458→22060→17334→29206→27965, showing a significant fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, it shifted from about 13458 to 22060 (backward by about 8600 places). In 2023, it briefly recovered to 17334. In 2024, it sharply dropped to 29206 (backward by about 11872 places compared to 2023). In 2025, it slightly recovered to 27965 (forward by about 1241 places compared to 2024). Over the past 3 years, it has cumulatively shifted backward by about 10631 places, with severe fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is about 27965. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 85 in both 2021 and 2022, 84 in 2023 and 2024, and increased to 87 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 95, an increase of 8 students (about 9.2%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, theoretically easing competition slightly, but needs to be assessed in conjunction with the total number of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), with recent rankings slightly declining from 75th to 84th, overall stable in the 75–84 range, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering universities. Recent reputation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with general short video exposure and moderate application attention. Electrical Engineering A (national top level), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, two flagship disciplines highly aligned with the power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. The social popularity of electrical majors remains high (2024 professional popularity index 74.28, high-heat recommendation), making it the core competitiveness and application hotspot of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major has high social popularity and is highly recommended, Energy and Power majors are recommended, and Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc., are also relatively popular majors. The number of provincial Physics Category examinees continues to grow: 2021 166,000→2022 195,000→2023 220,000→2024 246,000→2025 261,000. In 2026, the total provincial examinees are about 521,000, estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, an increase of about 120,000 compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is located in Beijing, not a provincial university, with no local preference. The university's enrollment in Jiangsu accounts for about 3–4% of its total national enrollment, a normal out-of-province proportion, with no obvious regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.2% (easing competition), the substantial increase of about 120,000 provincial Physics Category examinees (intensifying competition), the high-heat recommendation of the flagship electrical major (attracting high-scoring candidates), and stable reputation, the expansion and increase in examinees offset each other, but the increase in examinees far exceeds the expansion, so competition is expected to intensify overall. Based on the 2025 baseline of 27965, the predicted minimum ranking is about 29808, with a range of 29308–30308.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 29308–30308, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Energy and Power, Nuclear Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid, Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 economics and management majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<29308), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 electrical flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>30308), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety net majors, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次约 5464→5607→6431→6866→6276，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021–2022 年基本持平（5464→5607），2023 年后移至 6431 名，2024 年继续后移至 6866 名（近 4 年最高），2025 年小幅回升至 6276 名（较 2024 年前移约 590 名）。近 3 年累计后移约 812 名，2025 年基准约 6276 名；本省历史类计划 2021–2022 年均为 6 人，2023–2024 年增至 7 人，2025 年回落至 6 人；2026 年计划 6 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 84 名（2026 年），属中上水平理工类高校，但历史类招生专业以文法经管为主，非该校传统优势方向；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度未进入全国前 100 名，报考关注度中等；该校 A 级学科（电气工程 A、动力工程及工程热物理 A-）均为理工类，与历史类招生专业（法学、外语、公管、新传）无直接学科映射关系，学科优势对历史类考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业中，法学社会热度推荐（偏热），网络与新媒体/新闻传播社会热度明显劝退，外国语言文学一般观望；本省历史类考生数波动：2021 年 9.5 万→2022 年 10.2 万→2023 年 9.9 万→2024 年 9.2 万→2025 年 9.7 万，2026 年全省总考生约 52.1 万，按近年历史类占比约 27% 估算约 14 万人，较 2025 年增加约 4.3 万人，竞争有所加剧；华北电力大学（北京）位于北京，非本省高校；历史类招生仅 6 人，属极小规模招生，受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026 年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生增加约 4.3 万人（竞争加剧）、学科优势对历史类吸引力有限以及法学专业偏热等因素，考生增加是主要推动力。在 2025 年基准 6276 名基础上，预测最低位次约 6426 名，区间 5926–6926 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 5464→5607→6431→6866→6276, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. 2021–2022 were basically flat (5464→5607), 2023 moved back to 6431, 2024 continued to move back to 6866 (highest in nearly 4 years), and 2025 slightly recovered to 6276 (about 590 places forward compared to 2024). The cumulative backward movement over the past 3 years is about 812 places, with a baseline of about 6276 in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 students in 2021–2022, increased to 7 in 2023–2024, and dropped back to 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 84th (2026), a mid-to-upper level science and engineering university, but History Category majors are mainly in literature, law, economics, and management, not the school's traditional strengths. Reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity not in the national top 100, with moderate application attention. The school's A-level disciplines (Electrical Engineering A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-) are all science and engineering, with no direct subject mapping to History Category majors (Law, Foreign Languages, Public Administration, Journalism and Communication), so the disciplinary advantage has limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category majors, Law has a socially recommended popularity (slightly hot), Network and New Media/Journalism and Communication have a clear socially discouraged popularity, and Foreign Language and Literature is generally wait-and-see. The number of provincial History Category candidates fluctuates: 95,000 in 2021→102,000 in 2022→99,000 in 2023→92,000 in 2024→97,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total provincial candidates are about 521,000, with History Category estimated at about 27% or 140,000, an increase of about 43,000 compared to 2025, intensifying competition. North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. History Category enrollment is only 6 students, a very small scale, with minimal impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation and backward trend, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the increase of about 43,000 provincial History Category candidates (intensified competition), the limited appeal of disciplinary advantages to History Category, and the slight heat of Law major, the increase in candidates is the main driving force. Based on the 2025 baseline of 6276, the predicted minimum ranking is about 6426, with a range of 5926–6926.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 5926–6926, History Category enrollment is only 6 students, leaving limited major selection space. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Public Administration, Translation), with Tier 1 Law as a reach, and Tier 3 Network and New Media as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<5926), focus on reaching for Law; if the ranking is near the upper bound (>6926), it is recommended to use Network and New Media as a safety.
